overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path from open grasslands toward a medieval castle, then through a rocky passage and into a small village area. The scene features bright sunny weather with clear skies and historic stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path approaching castle walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the castle in the distance

entered.detail: large stone fortress with red-tiled towers visible in the distance
worn dirt trail with patches of grass
tall green grass and wildflowers lining both sides of the path
deciduous trees with green foliage scattered across the landscape
calm blue water becoming visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wide dirt path through open grasslands with scattered trees, approaching the stone walls of a medieval castle. The lake becomes visible on the left as the path continues forward through the sunny countryside.

events.description: path curves right around a wooden shrine with red roof

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path curves right, passing a small wooden shrine

entered.detail: small wooden post with red roof and carved symbols
rustic wooden fence running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path follows the lakeshore with water visible on the left and a wooden fence on the right. Geralt passes a small wooden shrine with a red roof as the path curves away from the castle main gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow trail between castle wall and rocky cliff

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the shaded narrow passage between the high castle wall and rocky outcrop

entered.detail: tall yellow-brown rock formation with layered sediment
massive oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a shaded corridor between the castle's stone wall on the left and a high rocky cliff on the right. Large trees arch over the trail creating dappled sunlight as Geralt continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with gate and cemetery

events.description: passing through wooden gate structure into village area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through a wooden gate into a village area with stone walls and gravestones

entered.detail: rustic wooden archway with hanging items and stone pillars
low moss-covered stone walls lining the path
weathered stone grave markers and tombs
wooden house with red tiled roof and chimney

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through a rustic wooden gate adorned with hanging items, entering a village area. Stone walls and gravestones line the path as a village house with a red roof becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with stone walls approaching house

events.description: NPC in red clothing becomes visible near the house

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the stone-walled path toward the village house where an NPC stands

notable_agents.action: standing near the house entrance wearing red clothing

segments.scene_description: The path continues between low stone walls toward a village house. An NPC in red clothing stands near the house entrance as Geralt approaches the end of the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from wide, sun-drenched grasslands toward the enclosed architecture of a medieval village. It begins with Geralt walking along a broad dirt path through open fields and scattered trees, gradually approaching the stone walls of a castle as a lake emerges on the left. As the path curves away from the main gate, the scenery shifts to follow the lakeshore past a small red-roofed shrine and a wooden fence before narrowing into a shaded corridor between a high rocky cliff and the castle wall. The scene then transitions through a rustic wooden gate into a village area, where the open light gives way to a path lined with stone walls and gravestones. Finally, the camera moves past these markers toward a red-roofed house where an NPC in red clothing stands waiting at the end of the trail.
